title: cymbopogon hamatulus
intro: Cymbopogon hamatulus, also known as the lemon-scented grass or hamatulus lemongrass, is a tropical grass plant native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon hamatulus include relief from fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its potential to aid in the reduction of stress and anxiety. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
